discovery.reason: Canonical operations/action-runs/discover-skill-sources/latest.json is absent from the default branch while the discovery producer workflow and scripts exist. A bounded fallback was needed so the loop produced reviewable candidate metadata instead of status-only churn.

review.reason: Manual discovery fallback produced four metadata-only public candidates. Three are review_next and one is watch. Source review must verify license, usefulness, risk, security/runtime surface, and redistribution boundaries before any source profile, normalization, catalog, package, or publication work.
review.action: Review metadata only for modelcontextprotocol/servers, vercel/ai, and openclaw/openclaw first. Treat QuantaAlpha/GitTaskBench as watch until license is verified. Do not clone, execute, copy, import, normalize, package, publish, or endorse candidates during source review unless separately authorized by board gates.

catalog.reason: The risk review changed package-facing skill metadata/body for dist/skills/auditing-mcp-servers-for-tool-poisoning/SKILL.md: risk_level high, requires_review true, domain security-defensive, review gate, and redacted default probing detail. Generated catalog surfaces required refresh or verification before package/publication endorsement.

risk.reason: Package-facing uncategorized skill included live MCP server probing, SSRF target testing, unauthenticated endpoint checks, and tool-description prompt-injection handling. It required review/redaction before routine metadata classification, manual discovery expansion, catalog endorsement, package endorsement, or publication endorsement.
risk.action: Closed after package-facing skill was converted to a high-risk authorized-use defensive wrapper and risk report was created.

critic.reason: Catalog still has a large uncategorized-domain and unspecified-risk backlog under the current quality gate.
critic.action: Continue bounded metadata backfill batches only after discovery/source-review gates allow it.
